title: Tell HMRC about a transferor or settlor who is not a long-term UK resident (D31a)
body: "You should only use this form alongside a completed Inheritance Tax IHT100 form (IHT100a to IHT100h).  How to complete the form  You need to:   Download and save the form on your computer. Open it using the latest free version of Adobe Reader. Complete it on-screen. The form may not work if you try to open it in your internet browser. If the form does not open, contact online services support for more help.  "
